title: nageia formosensis
intro: Nageia formosensis, also known as Formosan umbrella tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Podocarpaceae, characterized by its umbrella-shaped crown. The medicinal properties of Nageia formosensis are attributed to its leaves and bark, which are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, exhibiting anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Nageia formosensis include the potential treatment of various diseases, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. In traditional medicine, Nageia formosensis is prepared as a tea or infusion by decocting its leaves and bark in water, or as a tincture by soaking the plant material in a solvent.
